songs.title: Extraordinary Girl
feed: “Extraordinary Girl” by Green Day debuts at #1 in Personal Hot 100.

“Extraordinary Girl” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 395,577 total units.
